overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk through a sunny Los Santos street. The camera moves along sidewalks past historic and modern buildings, crosses an intersection with passing vehicles including a Meteorite delivery truck, and ends by following a small dog past a Spanish-style building with green awnings.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with historic stucco buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past utility boxes and street lamps

entered.detail: bright yellow fire hydrant on the sidewalk edge
two-story building with arched windows and red tile roof
tall palm tree visible down the street
light blue concrete wall with green hedge on top
red fire hydrant on the sidewalk
row of newspaper boxes on the sidewalk
tall glass and steel skyscraper in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sunlit urban sidewalk next to a historic stucco building with arched windows. The camera passes a bright yellow fire hydrant and concrete utility box, with a modern office tower visible in the distance. The street is quiet with sparse traffic and no pedestrians.

events.description: white delivery truck with 'Meteorite Candybox' branding passes through the intersection from left to right
turns right and begins crossing the street toward the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: waiting at the intersection corner then crossing the street as the truck passes

notable_agents.action: white Meteorite delivery truck driving through the intersection

entered.detail: red octagonal stop sign at the intersection corner
white regulatory sign reading 'DO NOT BLOCK INTERSECTION'
white box truck with large orange 'METEORITE' lettering
tall modern office building with reflective glass facade
brick-paved pedestrian crosswalk with white lines

segments.scene_description: Approaching a sunlit intersection with a stop sign and 'Do Not Block' sign visible. A white Meteorite delivery truck passes through the intersection. The camera turns right and crosses the brick-paved crosswalk, with modern glass office buildings visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk along Spanish-style commercial building with outdoor seating

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk following a small dog past outdoor cafe seating

notable_agents.action: small gray dog walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: pink stucco building with red tile roof and arched windows
dark green canvas awnings over the building windows
large beige patio umbrellas over outdoor seating
black metal park benches along the walkway
well-manicured green hedges bordering the seating area

segments.scene_description: Walking along the opposite sidewalk past a distinctive pink Spanish-style building with green awnings and outdoor cafe seating. The camera follows a small gray dog walking ahead, passing trimmed hedges and park benches. The area appears to be a commercial plaza with outdoor dining furniture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit urban district that transitions from a quiet historic street to a bustling commercial plaza. It begins by gliding along a sidewalk beside a stucco building with arched windows, passing a yellow fire hydrant and a concrete utility box while a modern office tower looms in the distance. As the camera approaches a sunlit intersection, a white Meteorite delivery truck passes by before the view turns right to cross a brick-paved crosswalk framed by glass office buildings. The scene then shifts toward a commercial area, moving past a pink Spanish-style building with green awnings and outdoor cafe seating. Finally, the camera follows a small gray dog walking ahead past trimmed hedges and park benches toward the heart of the plaza.
